# Firstfruits Christian Academy

> A co-educational Christian secondary school in Igbo-Etche, Rivers State, offering BECE & WAEC approved education, boarding facilities, and Christ-centered values.

Firstfruits Christian Academy is a private secondary school built on the motto "Obedience and Excellence." The site shares the school's vision, academic programs, admission process, facilities, and contact information.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Welcome, highlights, facilities, testimonials, and calls to action.
- [About](/about): Vision, mission, motto, and message from the Head of School.
- [Academics](/academics): Curriculum, facilities, and student life programs.
- [Admissions](/admissions): Application process, requirements, and session dates.
- [Contact](/contact): School contact details and inquiry form.
